Business Development Manager - Acme

Acme

About Acme

Acme is a fast-growing marketplace connecting businesses worldwide.

Role Overview

We're looking for a driven Business Development Manager to grow our partner network.

What You Will Be Doing

  • KPIs - Consistently achieve sales targets
  • Outreach - Calling key decision-makers via phone, email and social touches
  • Selling - Present, promote and sell products and services through demos
  • Sales Cycle - Managing the entire sales process from prospecting to close

This list is not exhaustive.

What We Are Looking For

  • Experience - Minimum 1 year of solid B2B sales with a track record of success
  • Industry - SaaS or marketplace experience is highly desirable
  • Relationship Building - You are a true hunter and relationship builder

Added bonus

  • Bi-lingual - Fluency in English and another language
  • Industry Experience - Background in the beauty and wellness industry
